Welcome, all who may click on this! "Another Warrior Cats R.P.G. bot ?!?!?! Swift, you already have one !" You may think. Yes, it is another W.C. R.P.G. bot BUT( ! ) with something else: different Clans !

This is based on yet another book of mine, so if you wish to have any sneak-peaks, you may DM swiftcreat3s on Discord !!

medicine cats hunt here, by the way, forgot to add that

( i just wanted to add :: thanks so much to everyone who chats with my bots and roleplays with them - thanks so much. it makes my work feel valid, as i really try to produce the best content for all of you ! many hearts !! 💙💙💙 )
